configurations.name: Live Run — Full Discovery Pipeline
configurations.description: Runs all 3 discovery agents (Core Leather, Lateral Industries, Shopify Footprint), NLP classification, and Excel export. Takes ~15-20 min. Requires OPENAI_API_KEY + SERPER_API_KEY in .env.

configurations.name: Exporter — Regenerate Excel
configurations.description: Re-exports leads.db to kritikaal_leads_export.xlsx without any scraping or API calls. Safe to run at any time.

configurations.name: Test Pipeline — Dry Run
configurations.description: Validates the pipeline imports and logic without making any API calls or writing to the DB. Use this after code changes.

configurations.name: Dashboard — Streamlit UI
configurations.description: Phase 2E: Visual lead management dashboard. NOT YET IMPLEMENTED — dashboard.py does not exist yet. Install streamlit first: pip install streamlit
